_comment: Mosquito Beast (蚊兽) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Mosquito Beast

canonical.appearance: Blood-drinking insectoid swarm beast. Evolves from millions of blood-drinking mosquitoes that absorbed spirit beast blood. Wang Lin obtained his in Mosquito Valley.
canonical.size: Worker 0.3m wingspan, Soldier 1m, Elite 3m wingspan, Queen 10m, Ancient Queen 50m

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Mosquito Beast Queen core can refine blood-attribute pills; swarm cores used in mass-poison alchemy
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Wang Lin's mosquito swarm cores are collected after battles; the Queen's core is unique

hive_mind_anchor.canon_note: Mosquito Beast swarm is telepathically linked to the Queen; Wang Lin controls via Dream Dao

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.

_inner_dan_note: Swarm-type beast — no traditional inner dan. The swarm itself is the 'core.' Canon information, not a gap.
